platforms.description: Group 2/3 modular fixed-wing UAS with 3D-printed airframe. Packs into a single Pelican case, man-portable, launch-ready in under 10 minutes. Open architecture supports ISR, EW, comms relay, and light strike missions. Swappable propulsion modules (pusher prop or micro turbojet). 3D printed in ~9 hours, fully assembled in 36 hours. OCTRA flight controller/mission computer controls vehicles 10-1000+ lbs.

specs.launch_method: catapult or rail, hand launch possible

platforms.documentation_availability: limited (defense-focused, some public specs from AUSA/JIFX demos)

platforms.description: Hand-launchable miniature precision-guided system (mPGS). Under 10 lbs, ruck-portable, launch-ready in under 30 seconds. Onboard ATR (Automatic Target Recognition) with autonomous terminal guidance. Designed for small-team organic fires and real-time ISR. Priced for mass employment.

specs.recovery_method: terminal impact (loitering munition) or belly landing

platforms.documentation_availability: minimal (specs from Medium blog posts and conference appearances)

platforms.description: Group 1 FPV quadcopter combining Orqa's battle-tested technology with Firestorm's additive manufacturing. US-built with NDAA-compliant components. Partnership between Firestorm Labs and Orqa FPV for at-scale production. Designed for US warfighter and allied forces.

Open-architecture ISR quadcopter with NVIDIA Jetson Xavier NX/Orin NX onboard. GNSS-denied capable via VIO and optical flow. Foldable arms for backpack transport, deployable in 4 minutes. Supports Doodle Labs or Silvus datalinks. STANAG 4609 compliant video. Multiple payload options including FLIR Hadron 640R, NextVision Dragoneye 2/Starling, SIYI ZR10. Water resistant IP54.

specs.compute: NVIDIA Xavier NX 16GB or Orin NX 16GB
specs.payload_options: FLIR Hadron 640R, NextVision Dragoneye 2, NextVision Starling, SIYI ZR10

platforms.gcs: SteamDeck (default), compatible with most MAVLink GCS

platforms.description: NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano-powered FPV drone with AI-driven terminal guidance. Open architecture enables autonomous target acquisition and terminal guidance against armored vehicles with manual abort/takeover capability. 10-inch frame with 3kg payload capacity. Compatible with standard headsets (e.g. Radiomaster) and digital radios (Silvus, Doodle Labs). Single integrated PCB serves as flight controller and airframe top cover. Designed to overcome EW with autonomous guidance.

specs.ai_capability: autonomous target acquisition, terminal guidance, ATR
